old_value: {"id":"broadside-su96","title":"Test with Fediverse Pasture test vectors","description":"Fediverse Pasture Inputs (codeberg.org/funfedidev/fediverse-pasture-inputs) provides test vectors for interop — Notes from Misskey, Pleroma, GoToSocial, etc. that exercise edge cases.
